description.value: Price +1 bonus; Aura moderate evocation; CL 8th; Weight â DESCRIPTION Upon command, a shock weapon is sheathed in crackling electricity that deals an extra 1d6 points of electricity damage on a successful hit. The electricity does not harm the wielder. The effect remains until another command is given. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells call lightning or lightning bolt; Cost +1 bonus
